name: Android Codespace
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y wget unzip git openjdk-17-jdk && mkdir -p /opt/android-sdk/cmdline-tools && cd /opt && wget https://dl.google.com/android/repository/commandlinetools-linux-11076708_latest.zip -O cmdline-tools.zip && unzip -o cmdline-tools.zip -d /opt/android-sdk && mv /opt/android-sdk/cmdline-tools /opt/android-sdk/latest && mkdir -p /opt/android-sdk/cmdline-tools && mv /opt/android-sdk/latest /opt/android-sdk/cmdline-tools/latest && yes | /opt/android-sdk/cmdline-tools/latest/bin/sdkmanager --sdk_root=/opt/android-sdk --install 'platform-tools' 'platforms;android-36' 'build-tools;36.0.0' 'cmake;3.22.2' 'ndk;27.1.0'
